Billing Glossary

Shared terms for the billing workspace.

glossarybilling.credits

Credits reduce future invoice balances.

Billing Policy

Refund policy references billing.credits across files.

claimbilling.refundsdraft

Refunds create credit adjustments after ledger persistence succeeds.

depends_on
billing.ledger

Billing Ledger

Ledger objects can live in nested source directories.

claimbilling.ledgerverified

The ledger records every credit and refund balance movement.

owner
team-billing
verified_at
2026-05-06
source
ledger reconciliation report
